content: @upstash/ratelimit 2.0.8 (current) + @upstash/redis 1.38.0: serverless-native rate limiting using Redis. Works in Next.js middleware at the edge before route handlers. Algorithms: slidingWindow (recommended, smooth, no boundary bursts), fixedWindow (for multi-region to reduce Redis commands), tokenBucket. Pattern: Ratelimit.slidingWindow(10, '10 s'). Use Redis.fromEnv() for init, ephemeralCache: new Map() for local dedup. Blocks traffic before backend—ideal for auth endpoints. Free tier generous. Requires Upstash Redis account or self-hosted Redis with REST API.
